sources.name: CSO County Incomes and Regional GDP 2024
sources.caveat: County-level figures below NUTS3 are CSO experimental estimates. Some counties suppressed for confidentiality.

sources.name: Eurostat Regional GDP per Inhabitant in PPS (NUTS3), 2023
sources.unit: PPS (Purchasing Power Standards, € equivalent, EU27=100 basis)
sources.caveat: Dublin and South-West published directly. Other Irish NUTS3 derived from CSO GVA × Ireland PPS/GVA ratio — labelled as estimates.

sources.name: Eurostat National Accounts — GDP per Capita (nama_10_pc), 2023
sources.caveat: EU country PPS values derived from published index (EU27=100) × EU average of 38,100 PPS.

sources.name: CSO Labour Force Survey (LFS) 2024
sources.caveat: Regional unemployment rates are CSO LFS annual averages. Small area estimates have wider confidence intervals.

sources.name: CSO County Incomes — Disposable Income per Person 2024
Residential Tenancies Board (RTB) Rent Index Q2 2024
sources.caveat: Rent figures are mean new tenancy rents, not renewal rents. Actual rents in existing tenancies may differ.

sources.name: CSO Annual National Accounts (ANA) 2024
sources.caveat: GDP is distorted by MNC intellectual property and aircraft leasing. GNI* (Modified GNI) is the preferred domestic income measure.

sources.name: Irish Fiscal Advisory Council (IFAC) Fiscal Assessment Report 2026
Wind Energy Ireland — Annual Statistics 2024
sources.caveat: County-level wind capacity is approximate. Some cross-county installations assigned to primary county.

sources.name: EirGrid Transmission System Operator — Generation Capacity Report 2024
sources.caveat: Grid constraint assessments are operational status, not published ratings.

sources.name: CSO Regional Population Projections, January 2025
sources.caveat: Projections are modelled estimates under CSO M2F2 scenario. Actual outcomes will depend on migration, fertility, and mortality trends.

sources.name: CSO Population and Migration Estimates 2024–2025
sources.caveat: Regional migration splits are modelled estimates based on CSO POWSCAR data and historical patterns — not directly measured by CSO at NUTS3 level.

sources.name: CSO Foreign Direct Investment Statistics 2023
sources.caveat: Regional FDI shares based on NUTS2 (not NUTS3) assembly regions. County-level FDI not published by CSO.

sources.name: National Development Plan 2021–2030
sources.caveat: NDP regional allocations are modelled estimates based on published sectoral envelopes and regional breakdown proxies. Not direct NUTS3 allocations from DPENDR.
